statements.description: Phase 1: Expire changed rows by setting EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent=0 where SourceRowHash differs
Phase 2: Insert net-new BKs and re-insert newly expired rows with current attribute values and IsCurrent=1

scoping.notes: SCD Type 2 via two-phase expire+insert. Hash covers 5 attributes. Country and TaxID are loaded but not tracked for change detection.

classification.rationale: The writer proc uses a two-phase pattern: Phase 1 expires changed rows by setting EffectiveEnd and IsCurrent=0; Phase 2 inserts new and re-versioned rows. The table has EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, and IsCurrent columns, which are canonical SCD Type 2 column-shape signals.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares PK_Dim_Vendor on Vendor_SK; the column is an identity auto-increment, confirming it as a system-assigned surrogate key.

natural_key.rationale: The identity on Vendor_SK confirms it as surrogate; the proc Phase 1 joins on dw.Vendor_BK = src.VendorCode to identify rows for expiry, confirming Vendor_BK as the business natural key.

watermark.rationale: The proc performs full hash-based comparison with no watermark filter; DW_InsertDate (DATETIME2) is the best available datetime column for tracking insertion order in incremental reads.

pii_actions.rationale: ContactName is a person name (NVARCHAR), matching the full_name PII pattern; no catalog classification present so flagged via column-name analysis.
TaxID is a tax identifier (VARCHAR), a sensitive business identifier that warrants masking; no catalog classification present so flagged via column-name analysis.

refactor.extracted_sql: -- Extracted SELECT for etl.usp_Load_Dim_Vendor -- SCD2 two-phase: Phase 1 (expiry) + Phase 2 (new rows), combined with UNION ALL -- Phase 1: Rows to be expired - all target columns with expiry SET values applied SELECT dw.Vendor_SK, dw.Vendor_BK, dw.VendorName, dw.ContactName, dw.City, dw.Country, dw.TaxID, dw.PaymentTerms, dw.VendorStatus, dw.EffectiveStart, DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AS EffectiveEnd, 0 AS IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_UpdateDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM [dbo].[Dim_Vendor] dw INNER JOIN [PTP_System].[Master].[Vendors] src ON dw.Vendor_BK = src.VendorCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 WHERE dw.SourceRowHash <> HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, ''), ISNULL(src.City, ''), src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus)) UNION ALL -- Phase 2: Net-new BKs and new versions of expired rows SELECT NULL AS Vendor_SK, src.VendorCode AS Vendor_BK, src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, 'Unknown') AS ContactName, ISNULL(src.City, 'Unknown') AS City, ISNULL(src.Country, 'Unknown') AS Country, ISNULL(src.TaxID, 'Unknown') AS TaxID, src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, 1 AS IsCurrent, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_InsertDate, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_UpdateDate, HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, ''), ISNULL(src.City, ''), src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus)) AS SourceRowHash FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Vendors] src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[Dim_Vendor] dw WHERE dw.Vendor_BK = src.VendorCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 )
refactor.refactored_sql: -- Refactored CTE for etl.usp_Load_Dim_Vendor (dbo.Dim_Vendor) -- Pattern: import / logical / final -- SCD2: Phase 1 expires changed rows; Phase 2 adds net-new and re-versioned rows WITH -- Import CTEs source_vendors AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Vendors] ), existing_dim_vendor AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Vendor] ), -- Logical CTEs -- Phase 1: current DW rows whose tracked attributes have changed (to be expired) expired_rows AS ( SELECT dw.Vendor_SK, dw.Vendor_BK, dw.VendorName, dw.ContactName, dw.City, dw.Country, dw.TaxID, dw.PaymentTerms, dw.VendorStatus, dw.EffectiveStart, DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AS EffectiveEnd, 0 AS IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_UpdateDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM existing_dim_vendor dw INNER JOIN source_vendors src ON dw.Vendor_BK = src.VendorCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 WHERE dw.SourceRowHash <> HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, ''), ISNULL(src.City, ''), src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus)) ), -- Phase 2: net-new BKs and new versions of expired rows (no current row exists) new_rows AS ( SELECT NULL AS Vendor_SK, src.VendorCode AS Vendor_BK, src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, 'Unknown') AS ContactName, ISNULL(src.City, 'Unknown') AS City, ISNULL(src.Country, 'Unknown') AS Country, ISNULL(src.TaxID, 'Unknown') AS TaxID, src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, 1 AS IsCurrent, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_InsertDate, CONVERT(DATETIME2(0), GETDATE()) AS DW_UpdateDate, HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.VendorName, ISNULL(src.ContactName, ''), ISNULL(src.City, ''), src.PaymentTerms, src.VendorStatus)) AS SourceRowHash FROM source_vendors src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM existing_dim_vendor dw WHERE dw.Vendor_BK = src.VendorCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 ) ), -- Final CTE: union of both write operations final AS ( SELECT * FROM expired_rows UNION ALL SELECT * FROM new_rows ) SELECT * FROM final
